parent_text: Hi team, is it possible for our direct solution to house multiple brands/locations for a foodhall? For example, a Foodhall has 47 separate outlets under one roof, all on same POS. They would like customers to be able to scan a QR and see the list of brands and have the ability to order across a multitude shops in one basket.
Hi Team - Customer TinyFish has products on their menu that require 1 day lead time so they're asking if there's something we have something that can help them to offer this.

Hey team, quick question. When customers check out as guests, does our platform still capture and present their data (like email, name, and phone number) to the operator? Also, can operators use our marketing platform to include these guest checkouts in email or text campaigns?
Thanks Leslie Lopez. Super opportunity. Happy to also get connected with them if needed. See below my answers:
Hello! Any tips?

Hi team ~ This customer {67ebf5b0d19f601221fe34f6} flagged that their customers are only receiving order confirmations by email & whatsapp. Is there an extra setting needed to send sms notifications please?
Hey team, Have we ever considered putting a link/button similar to this card in the video, allowing the user to save the Online Ordering in their mobile as a browser app?
Hi Team, Account name: Laudinella (675bf56c6060ff14a9af1329). The merchant is asking if we have an option to export the reviews for their account. Do we have that option?
Hi team! I'm a bit rusty on this topic, so I'm assuming something new might have come to play: what is the process to add virtual brands with Direct currently?

Hey team quick question regarding the Freedom Pay integration: 1.) Is Moneris a readily available payment processor we can integrate with from now? 2.) Givex Gift Card integration: Is that also readily available from now?
Where would we send an existing customer to find out about how much it'd cost for a Direct subscription?
guys can you help me to confirm what is the best way to sync location phone numbers from core?
Hi team! Quick question, if we patch the tips for OO, should we be able to see the change in the checkout? I update them to be 15, 20 and 25% but the site was still showing 5,10 and 15%
Hey team, could you please export the loyalty cashback data for the customers on this account? 665d4f4c47b6cf40cc39dba9 Cafe63.
Hi team, is there currently scope on the roadmap for QR/Online Ordering to allow split bills for customers? Similar to this from me&u
hi team! created this FEAR regarding Square loyalty. Have lost a few growth deals due to not having this integration
hi team, could I have some info regarding the pricing for the B2B on direct? The prospect wants to know the conditions
Hi team, Krispy Kreme AU is requesting we extend the 'item limit' feature to Direct channels.
Hi team, I have KFC Netherlands informing the Direct stores 66573434f9b3c924c38df51b are not displaying menus.
Hi team, are we able to customize the name of the loyalty points? E.g. "Burger Bucks"
Hi Team, Account name: Ze dos Frangos (ZoneSoft). The merchant has an issue with the section for discount bar as it is causing issues with their customers
